ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unit code of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Core, Major, Elective) */,
  "credit_points" REAL /* Credit points assigned to the course */,
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course, if any */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semester(s) in which the course is offered */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the course details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_id") REFERENCES prerequisites ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pre-requisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the pre-requisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pre-requisite course */,
  "min_grade" TEXT /* Minimum grade required in the pre-requisite course */,
  "is_corequisite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pre-requisite can be taken concurrently with the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "admission_year" TEXT /* Year the student was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Completed, Dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student enrolled in the course */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the student enrolled in the course */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is being taken as an audit (non-credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
